attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CXM.EXCEPTION_ID, CXM.ORG_CODE, CXM.MAJOR_PID, CXM.FLB, CXM.PO_NO, CXM.PO_LINE_NO, CXM.SHIP_DATE, CXM.SHIPMENT_NO, CXM.RECEIVED_QTY, CXM.FLB_QTY, CXM.FLB_COST, CXM.EXCEPTION_TYPE, CXM.DF_FEE, CXM.EXCEPTION_STATUS, CXM.INVOICE_NO, CXM.INVOICE_LINE, CXM.RETRO_AMOUNT, CXM.RETRO_INVOICE_STATUS, CXM.RETRO_INVOICE_NO, CXM.RETRO_INVOICE_LINE, CXM.FLOW, CXM.ATTRIBUTE1, CXM.ATTRIBUTE2, CXM.ATTRIBUTE3, CXM.ATTRIBUTE4, CXM.ATTRIBUTE5, CXM.ATTRIBUTE6, CXM.ATTRIBUTE7, CXM.ATTRIBUTE8, CXM.ATTRIBUTE9, CXM.ATTRIBUTE10, CXM.ATTRIBUTE11, CXM.ATTRIBUTE12, CXM.ATTRIBUTE13, CXM.ATTRIBUTE14, CXM.ATTRIBUTE15, CXM.REQUEST_ID, CXM.CREATION_DATE, CXM.CREATED_BY, CXM.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CXM.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CXM.UOM, CXM.COMMENTS, CXM.RESOLVED_FLB_COST, CXM.RESOLUTION_DATE,
CXM.GES_UPDATE_DATE, CXM.GLOBAL_NAME, 
/* priyavij: 11/08/2015 added as a part of September QWIN retro Overhaul */
CXM.RECEIPT_NUMBER, CXM.RESOLVED_DF_FEE, CXM.ASN_CREATION_DATE 
FROM
CG1_X_MK_EXCP_LOG_STG CXM WHERE CXM.LAST_UPDATE_DATE > to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
